titleStmt.title: SII 33.137: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 137. (A.R. No. B 2 of 1950.) Cumbum, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Stone under a tree near the Inspection Bungalow, on the tank bund.

Records that the north wall of the north shrine of the Cumbum tank was repaired under the supervision of Major De Butts, Civil Engineer, 2nd Division. Mentions Peddakaṁaṇam Sundara Mudaliyār, the writer of Major De Butts, Araṇi Kandappa the Maistry, Ayyāsāmi Mudaliyār, the Taluka Maistry and the engraver of the record Rāmayya (son of), Dattayya. Also refers to Nikhāsāṁ Khān and Vīrama Rājaṁma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī meṁpurṣatuyaryagusanavaḍiyalu ce ka
ṁbhamu cervukaṭa kā drohiyagunaredṛ
vāradhaḍvukni maṭeyunu . nadi vīramarājaṁmma . padilaṁ
bbugākuṁtta kaṭṭaṁcci ka¨rttive ghanatagāṁce . rājuku
puṁṇyaṁbburānaṁtta nikhāsāṁkhānuni Aḍigiḍai
kaṁbbudecci . kaḍamagaṭiṁcci nu paṭakalusavamu . Alu
gu kattu vagaṭiṁccinala veluśillagākida¨rbhegu
pu ḍu bheḷama doṁmmaḍu Aṣarapu bāhubaluḍū
sāva 1852 saṁ . me nelalō reṁḍoḍivijan śivilu
yiṁjanīru mējaruḍibaṭsu doragāruṁnnu
vāri raiṭaru peddakāmaṇaṁ suṁddara modalāriṁnni
doravāri mestri Araṇi kaṁdappagāruṁnnu tālukāmestri
Ayyāsāmi modalāriṁnni yī
kaṁbaṁ cēruvu vuttaraputūmu maṁ
ṭapaṁ vuttarapu gōḍa durastu ceyiṁccināru
dūpāḍu tālukalō cerina guṁḍlapālemu
lo kāparastuḍaina dattayya A rāma
yya veśina vilāsaṁ
Digital edition of SII 33.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
